nodes.name: Grey-throated warbler
nodes.summary: The grey-throated warbler (Myiothlypis cinereicollis) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is found in Colombia and Venezuela. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and heavily degraded former forest. There are three subspecies; Myiothlypis cinereicollis cinereicollis (found in central Colombia to W Venezuela) Myiothlypis cinereicollis pallidula (extreme NW of Sierra de Perijá. and N Colombia) Myiothlypis cinereicollis zuliensis (Sierra de Perijá, Colombia, and NW Venezuela) References
nodes.shortSummary: The grey-throated warbler (Myiothlypis cinereicollis) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is found in Colombia and Venezuela.

nodes.name: Myiothlypis
nodes.summary: Myiothlypis（Myiothlypis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联15种鸟类，如Grey-headed warbler、Santa Marta warbler、Citrine warbler等15种鸟类。
